title: xyris glabrata
intro: Xyris glabrata, also known as the yellow-eyed grass or swamp yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Xyridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Xyris glabrata include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Xyris glabrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, among other health benefits.
